remarks: Welcome to your dream summer retreat in Rowayton Beach Association! Available from 9/1-9/30, this stunning property offers an unparalleled experience for those seeking the ultimate summer getaway. $28,000 9/1-9/30 including Labor Day, immerse yourself in luxury and convenience.This home boasts 360-degree views and is just a short stroll away from not one, but two beaches, the RBA boat house, and all the summer activities Rowayton has to offer. Imagine relaxing on your private rooftop deck or enjoying concerts on the beach, all within walking distance from your doorstep. Step inside this custom-designed home to discover a chef's kitchen, complete with top-of-the-line appliances and finishes. With three sets of sliding French doors opening to a private garden oasis, indoor-outdoor living has never been more seamless.Retreat to the primary bedroom featuring a private balcony with water views, ample closet space, and a luxurious marble spa bath. Two additional bedrooms each with their own full baths ensure comfort and privacy for all guests. Ascend to the sun-drenched third-floor office where sparkling water views inspire productivity (complete with guest daybed), and access the private rooftop deck to soak in the sights and sounds of summer. With all these amenities just an hour away from NYC, make this your best summer yet. Don't miss out on this chance to live the ultimate beach lifestyle in Rowayton.
